title: Mr. Robinson
original_title: Il signor Robinson - Mostruosa storia d'amore e d'avventure
overview: A shipwreck strands a modern Italian businessman on a desert island. Like Robinson Crusoe he must find a way to return to civilization; unlike him--he's a 20th-century man, a totally different case.
